status: INTERIM — S1 export blocked on Workbench plugin registration (GUI/human step); S0 + API discovery + S2/S3/S4 source findings complete
subregionBBoxNote: Provisional. The plugin auto-selects the densest building 512 m cell from a 5x5 scan at run time; this placeholder is the central candidate cell.

S0.note: Everon world loaded in World Editor edit mode (bounds match manifest 12800^2, -204.78..375.53). No human step needed to load the world.

S1.blocker: New WorkbenchPlugin TBD_TerrainWorldExportPlugin.c is not registered as a menu action this session. WorkbenchPlugin entries are scanned at Workbench startup; the file was added after the 14:38 startup. wb_reload (target=scripts and target=both) returns ExecuteAction=false for every compile/reload menu path, so the NetAPI cannot trigger a recompile + plugin rescan. wb_execute_action 'Plugins,TBD,Export TBD World Subregion' returns false (action unavailable).
S1.humanStep: In the running Arma Reforger Workbench: reload scripts / rescan plugins (or restart the Workbench) so TBD_TerrainWorldExportPlugin registers, then re-run via MCP. (Equivalent: stop + relaunch via scripts/mod/tbd-dev-bootstrap.sh.)
S1.enumerationDesign: FLAT EDITOR LOOP IS INSUFFICIENT: WorldEditorAPI.GetEditorEntityCount()/GetEditorEntity(i) return only the ~10 TOP-LEVEL roots (EditorEntityIterator 'Skips all entities that are not top-level'), not the 1,235,873 placed objects. Placed objects are reached via a runtime spatial query.
apisProvenViaApiSearch: BaseWorld.QueryEntitiesByAABB(vector mins, vector maxs, QueryEntitiesCallback addEntity, filter=null, flags=ALL) -> bool
SCR_WorldEditorToolHelper.static array<IEntity> QueryEntitiesByAABB(World, mins, maxs, flags)
IEntity.GetOrigin(), IEntity.GetAngles() (EMCP handlers), IEntity.GetWorldBounds(out min,out max)

S2.result: API-PROVEN (pending export to populate a real row)
S2.mcpEvidence: api_search GetWorldBounds -> IEntity/entity classes expose 'void GetWorldBounds(out vector mins, out vector maxs)' (world-space AABB). Plugin emits halfExtentsM = (max-min)/2 per row; yaw from GetAngles. This is a real world AABB (not kind-default). True oriented-OBB half-extents would need local-bounds + rotation; world-AABB is sufficient for N6/T-090.6 footprint at spike scope.
S2.note: Cannot show a real building row's halfExtentsM until S1 export runs; the read path is wired + proven.

S3.result: SOURCE FOUND, no tile extracted -> ESCALATE (K3 red)
S3.satelliteSource: system/terrain/defSatMap_BCR.edds (engine default satellite map); per-terrain SAP/satellite background exists; wiki 'Satellite Background Image' field on MapEntity.et.
S3.note: No single-call pixel/tile capture API; extracting + retiling the .edds satellite is the T-090.1 basemap pipeline, not a spike one-call. Per locked decision: document source + escalate, do NOT fabricate a tile.

S4.cartographicSource: World Editor toolbar 'Export Map Data' -> Map Geometry Data .topo (road network, buildings, airfields) + Satellite Background Image. This is a REAL in-engine cartographic export.
S4.note: synthesized-cartographic (N9) is NOT strictly required — Reforger exposes a genuine cartographic data export. Producing a committed map tile from .topo is the T-090.1.1 Map-basemap slice (GUI 'Export Map Data' tool), not a spike one-call.

S5.evidence: Reforger uses procedural CLUTTER (grass atlases under Assets/Clutter/Procedural). Tree/forest cover on Everon is expected to be placed tree entities (reachable by QueryEntitiesByAABB) rather than an exported forest-region mask. 'GenSpawnableEntity' search returned nothing; an explicit forest-region/mask API was not found this pass.
S5.note: Confirm by counting tree-classified entities in the export (S1) before locking N5 path A vs B.

S6.result: BASIS KNOWN, remap measurement pending export
S6.enfusionBasis: Enfusion/Arma Reforger world space: Y-up, left-handed; +X east, +Z north, +Y up. Horizontal plane = (X,Z); editor Deck.gl uses (x=X, y=Z north). Export maps editor y -> mod z per the T-090 coordinate contract.
S6.anglesNote: IEntity.GetAngles() returns a vector (yaw about Y-up); exact component order (yaw/pitch/roll vs pitch/yaw/roll) to be confirmed against a known-oriented entity once S1 export runs.
S6.note: sampleEntity before/after rotation pending a real exported row.

gatesNote: All gates honestly RED: every K-row depends on the S1 subregion export (raw-entities.jsonl), which is blocked on the Workbench plugin-registration GUI step. APIs are proven and the plugin is written; gates flip once a human reloads/rescans plugins and the plugin is run via MCP. K2/K3/K4 findings above already de-risk the OBB + dual-basemap source paths.

handednessRemap.editorToExport: editor (x=X, y=Z) ; export z = editor y (T-090 coordinate contract)

satellite.evidence: asset_search 'sat' -> system/terrain/defSatMap_BCR.edds + per-terrain SAP satellite background (wiki '2D Map Creation' Satellite Background Image). No one-call tile capture; .edds extraction + retiling = T-090.1.

map.note: REAL cartographic source found: World Editor 'Export Map Data' -> .topo Map Geometry Data (roads/buildings/airfields). N9 synth not strictly required; tile production = T-090.1.1.
